products.title: Trycoo Mini PC Computers 13th Twin Lake N150 (Beat N97), 16GB DDR4 512GB SSD, WI6 Desktop Mini Computer with Type-C, Dual HDMI, RJ45 LAN Ethernet, 4K Triple Display, WiFi5, BT4.2
products.description_long: About this item13TH GEN N150 PROCESSOR - Compared to 12th gen N100 and N97, the performance is boosted by 20% and is 30% faster than the N95. We built our mini PC to feature 1000MHz UHD Graphics, 4 cores, 4 threads, 6MB cache, 2.0-3.6GHz, and a TDP of up to 15W. Ideal for multitasking, office, and light gaming.UPGRADE YOUR STORAGE EASILY -Built with 1 so-dimm 3200MHz DDR4 RAM slot and M.2 2280 SSD PCIe 3.0/SATA slot, this mini computer supports expansion up to 32GB RAM and 4TB SSD. It comes pre-installed with 16GB DDR4 RAM and a 512GB SATA SSD, enabling faster boot times and easy storage management.PREINSTALLED ADVANCED OS - Compatible with various operating OS(11 Pro, 11, 10 Pro, 10), including Linux, Ubuntu and Firewall Serve, this micro PC also supports features such as LAN wake-up, PXE boot, RTC wake-up, and auto power-on, making it an excellent option for use as a mini server.4K TRIPLE-SCREENS DISPLAY OUTPUT - Trycoo mini desktop computer supports triple displays via two HDMI 2.0 ports (4K 60Hz) and a 10Gbps Type-C port, ideal for multitasking. The Type-C port also supports USB 3.2/DP 1.4 and PD power input, offering transfer speeds up to 10Gbps—twice as fast as USB 3.2 Gen 1. Easily connect monitors, portable displays, or docking stations.FAST INTERNET CONNECTION - Our WI6 small PC supports 5GHz/2.4GHz dual-band Wi-Fi 5 (4x4 MU-MIMO) with speeds up to 120MB/s. It also features a built-in Gigabit Ethernet port (up to 1Gbps/125MB/s) and Bluetooth 4.2, enabling seamless connections to wireless peripherals such as mice, keyboards, and monitors.EXTENSIVE INTERFACES - Trycoo N150 mini PC features 2 USB 3.2 ports (up to 10Gbps), 2 USB 2.0 ports,2 HDMI ports, a Type-C port, and a 3.5mm audio jack. It supports WiFi 5, Gigabit Ethernet (RJ45 1000Mbps), and Bluetooth 4.2, allowing easy connection of external devices like printers and projectors. Perfect for both home and office use.TRYCOO WARRANTY - Trycoo provides a 1-year limited warranty for each mini PC, starting from the purchase date. It covers defects in design and workmanship. With a dedicated after-sales team ready to assist, you can enjoy your mini PC with peace of mind.
feature_bullets: 13TH GEN N150 PROCESSOR - Compared to 12th gen N100 and N97, the performance is boosted by 20% and is 30% faster than the N95.
UPGRADE YOUR STORAGE EASILY -Built with 1 so-dimm 3200MHz DDR4 RAM slot and M.2 2280 SSD PCIe 3.0/SATA slot.
PREINSTALLED ADVANCED OS - Compatible with various operating OS(11 Pro, 11, 10 Pro, 10), including Linux, Ubuntu and Firewall Serve.
4K TRIPLE-SCREENS DISPLAY OUTPUT - Trycoo mini desktop computer supports triple displays via two HDMI 2.0 ports (4K 60Hz) and a 10Gbps Type-C port.
FAST INTERNET CONNECTION - Our WI6 small PC supports 5GHz/2.4GHz dual-band Wi-Fi 5 (4x4 MU-MIMO) with speeds up to 120MB/s.
EXTENSIVE INTERFACES - Trycoo N150 mini PC features 2 USB 3.2 ports (up to 10Gbps), 2 USB 2.0 ports,2 HDMI ports, a Type-C port, and a 3.5mm audio jack.

products.title: Dell 27" Touchscreen All in One Desktop Computer PC - Intel Core 7 150U, 32GB DDR5 RAM & 1TB SSD, FHD IPS Display, NVIDIA GeForce MX570A, Wins 11 Pro, Wi-Fi 6E, Patented KB Kit
products.description_long: About this item🚀 DESKTOP POWERHOUSE: Intel Core 7 & NVIDIA Graphics : Unleash professional-grade performance with the Intel Core 7 150U (10 Cores, up to 5.4GHz). Paired with a dedicated NVIDIA GeForce MX570A (2GB), this All-in-One handles heavy multitasking, 4K streaming, light gaming, and creative work without lag. Perfect for power users who demand speed and reliability in a sleek design.👆 IMMERSIVE 27" FHD TOUCH EXPERIENCE : Transform your workspace with a stunning 27-inch FHD (1920x1080) Infinity Edge Touchscreen. Enjoy vibrant colors and wide viewing angles ideal for design work or movie nights. The anti-glare panel reduces eye strain during long sessions, while the responsive touch interface makes navigation intuitive for students and professionals alike.💾 PRO-GRADE MEMORY & MASSIVE STORAGE OPTIONS: Unlock ultimate multitasking power with 32GB DDR5 RAM, allowing you to run dozens of apps, browser tabs, and heavy software simultaneously without lag. Choose your perfect storage capacity: 1TB or massive 2TB PCIe NVMe SSD. Whether you need ample space for years of documents and HD media (1TB) or a colossal library for 4K video editing and large datasets (2TB), enjoy instant boot-ups, lightning-fast file transfers, and the freedom to keep all your critical data locally. No external hard drives needed for most users.📹 CRYSTAL-CLEAR COMMUNICATION & CONNECTIVITY: Look your best on every call with the advanced 5.2MP Webcam (2.8K video) and dual noise-canceling microphones. Stay future-proof with Wi-Fi 6E and Bluetooth 5.3. Versatile connectivity includes USB-C, Multiple USB-A, HDMI In/Out, Ethernet, and SD Reader—everything you need to connect monitors, peripherals, and networks without dongles.🎁 READY-TO-WORK SYSTEM: Get started right out of the box with Windows 11 Pro pre-installed. Enjoy enhanced security, advanced productivity tools, and powerful business features designed to help professionals, students, and home users work smarter and stay efficient.›See more product details
feature_bullets: DESKTOP POWERHOUSE: Intel Core 7 & NVIDIA Graphics : Unleash professional-grade performance with the Intel Core 7 150U (10 Cores, up to 5.4GHz).
IMMERSIVE 27" FHD TOUCH EXPERIENCE : Transform your workspace with a stunning 27-inch FHD (1920x1080) Infinity Edge Touchscreen.

This means you get more bandwidth and higher data processing and performance.NEVER MISS AN UPDATE: Your 990 EVO Plus SSD performs like new with the always up-to-date Magician Software. Stay up to speed with the latest firmware updates, extra encryption, and continual monitoring of your drive health–it works like a charm.

Compatible with Intel 13th/14th Gen and AMD Ryzen 7000 CPUs, it installs easily into M.2 Gen5 slots.

products.title: Samsung SSD 9100 PRO 2TB, PCIe 5.0x4 M.2 2280, Seq. Read Speeds Up to 14,700MB/s, Best for AI Computing, Gaming and Heavy Duty Workstations (MZ VAP2T0B/AM)
products.description_long: Blazing speed meets massive capacity built for AI and beyond. The Samsung 9100 PRO SSD delivers up to twice the speed of the 990 PRO SSD* and up to an 8TB storage option,** giving you the performance to handle AI workloads, 4K/8K video rendering, and advanced gaming. Your next gen performance starts here.*Sequential and random write performance was measured with Intelligent Turbo Write technology being activated. Intelligent Turbo Write operates only within a specific data transfer size. Performance may vary depending on the SSD’s firmware, storage capacity, system hardware & configuration, and other factors. For detailed information, please contact your local service center. The 4TB 9100 PRO SSD reaches 14,800 MB/s based on test system configuration: AMD Ryzen 97950X 16 Core Processor CPU@4.50GHz, DDR5 4800MHz 16GBx2, OS Ubuntu 22.04.2, Chipset ASRock X670E Taichi. To maximize the perfor mance of the 9100 PRO SSD, please check whether your system supports PCIe® 5.0 at the Intel or AMD website. **8TB capacity will be available later in 2025*990 PRO SSD Sequential Read/Write 1,221/1,255 MB/Watt, 9100 PRO SSD Sequential Read/Write 1,822/1,703MB /Watt based on test result of 2TB capacity model. Results vary by storage size.*Internet connection is required for authentification. Performance may vary based on the speed and quality of your Wi Fi connection.
feature_bullets: BREAKTHROUGH PCIe 5.0 PERFORMANCE: Supercharge your workflow and gaming with PCIe 5.0, boasting up to 14,700/13,400 MB/s* sequential read/write speeds.
EVERY TASK, TURBOCHARGED: Speed past productivity limits with fast game loads, seamless AI apps, and efficient multitasking.
THINK FAST, CREATE FASTER: Fuels seamless AI content creation, swift loads, and smooth gameplay.
SPEED, WHENEVER YOU NEED: From laptops to desktop PCs, experience blazing PCIe 5.0 speeds and up to 8TB of storage.
STAY COOL, RUN FAST: A 5nm controller boosts power efficiency while advanced thermal control keeps performance smooth.
WORKS LIKE MAGIC: Your 9100 PRO SSD performs like new with the always up-to-date Magician Software.
